basics.description:
**XdrLogRaider v0.1.0-beta** — Microsoft Sentinel connector ingesting Defender XDR portal-only telemetry (config / compliance / drift / exposure / governance) via a PowerShell Azure Function App. **45 streams** across 7 compliance tiers.

**Prerequisite**: you must already have a Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace. This deployment creates the connector resources (Function App + KV + Storage + DCE + DCR + App Insights) in your chosen RG, and adds **47 custom tables** (45 data + Heartbeat + AuthTestResult) + a Data Connector UI card to your existing workspace (cross-RG supported).

**After deploy**: run `./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName <from-output>` from the cloned repo to upload service-account auth secrets to Key Vault.

validations.message: You need Contributor or Owner on the target resource group to deploy. Pick a different RG or create a new one.

location.label: Connector region
location.toolTip: Region for connector resources (Function App, KV, Storage, App Insights). Can differ from the workspace region.

basics.name: projectPrefix
basics.label: Project prefix
basics.toolTip: 3-12 lowercase alphanumeric. Used as the prefix for all created resource names.

basics.name: env
basics.label: Environment
basics.toolTip: Environment tag used in resource names.

options.text: Before deploying, create a dedicated read-only Entra service account with `Security Reader` + `Defender XDR Analyst` roles. You will paste its UPN below and upload its credentials to Key Vault AFTER deploy. Never use a privileged or human account.

subLabel.preValidation: Point the connector at your existing Sentinel workspace

options.text: Required role on the workspace: 'Log Analytics Contributor' (or generic Contributor / Owner). 'Microsoft Sentinel Contributor' alone is NOT sufficient — does not grant workspaces/tables/write.

elements.name: existingWorkspace
elements.label: Sentinel workspace
elements.toolTip: Pick your existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace from the dropdown. Includes workspaces across ALL subscriptions in this tenant that you have access to. The workspace's region is auto-populated below; DCE and DCR must be created in the same region (Azure Monitor constraint).

options.text: [concat('Selected: ', steps('workspaceSettings').existingWorkspace.name, ' (region: ', steps('workspaceSettings').existingWorkspace.location, ') — DCE + DCR will be created in this region.')]

elements.name: workspaceLocationOverride
elements.label: Workspace region (override)
elements.toolTip: Auto-detected from the selected workspace above. Override only if the auto-detection is wrong (rare — e.g. region rename).

subLabel.preValidation: How the connector signs into security.microsoft.com

elements.name: serviceAccountUpn
elements.label: Service account UPN
elements.toolTip: UPN of the dedicated read-only Entra service account. e.g. svc-xdrlr@contoso.onmicrosoft.com

elements.name: authMethod
elements.label: Auth method
elements.toolTip: Both methods are unattended and auto-refreshing. Passkey is stronger against modern Conditional Access policies.

elements.name: uploadSecretsNow
elements.label: Upload auth secrets
elements.toolTip: If 'Upload via wizard', enter the secrets below — ARM writes them straight to Key Vault during deploy. If 'Upload via post-deploy script', leave the fields empty and run ./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName <name> after deploy completes.

elements.name: servicePassword
elements.toolTip: Service account password. Stored as Key Vault secret 'mde-portal-password'. Only used if Auth method = Credentials + TOTP and Upload = wizard.

constraints.validationMessage: Password is required when uploading via wizard

elements.name: totpSeed
elements.toolTip: Base32-encoded TOTP seed (the string behind the QR code when MFA is enrolled). 16+ chars, A-Z and 2-7 only. Stored as Key Vault secret 'mde-portal-totp'. Leave the field blank IF the service account is exempt from MFA.

elements.name: passkeyJson
elements.label: Passkey JSON
elements.toolTip: Full passkey JSON containing upn, credentialId, privateKeyPem (one-line ECDSA P-256 PEM, escaped). Stored as Key Vault secret 'mde-portal-passkey'.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a JSON object containing upn, credentialId, privateKeyPem

options.text: Run ./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName <from-output> after the deploy completes. The deployment Output contains the exact command. Self-test fires within ~5 min; check MDE_AuthTestResult_CL.

Secrets are written to Key Vault as part of the ARM deploy (Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets resources). They never appear in deployment history (SecureString). Self-test fires within ~5 min; check MDE_AuthTestResult_CL.

elements.name: hostingPlan
elements.label: Function App hosting plan
elements.toolTip: Cost vs security trade-off. consumption-y1 is the cheapest entry point (free tier on typical workload). flex-fc1 is the production-hardened tier with full Managed Identity. premium-ep1 is the regulated / compliance tier with always-warm and private endpoint capability. See docs/HOSTING-PLANS.md for the full matrix.

allowedValues.label: Premium (EP1) - regulated / compliance, always-warm + private endpoints

elements.name: restrictPublicNetwork
elements.label: Restrict public network access (requires VNet + private endpoints)
elements.toolTip: Set to true for regulated deploys; default false works in any tenant. When true, Storage / Key Vault / App Insights deny public traffic and the Function App must reach them via VNet integration + private endpoints. Operator must have the network plumbing ready before enabling.

elements.name: enableKeyVaultDiagnostics
elements.label: Enable Key Vault audit logging to Sentinel
elements.toolTip: Sends Key Vault Get/List Secrets events to the workspace for forensic visibility. Required for the post-breach audit trail of who read the connector's service-account credentials. Default true; only disable for cost-constrained labs that don't need the audit trail.

elements.name: githubRepo
elements.label: GitHub repo (owner/name)
elements.toolTip: Only override if you forked. Used to build the Function App code ZIP URL.

elements.name: deploySentinelContent
elements.label: Deploy Sentinel content (parsers, hunting queries, analytic rules, workbooks)
elements.toolTip: If 'Yes', the workspace receives the parsers + 14 disabled analytic rules + 9 hunting queries + 6 workbooks. If 'No', only the connector resources + 47 custom tables + Data Connector card are deployed (useful for re-deploys or limited workspace permissions).
